snippet.title: Polo G - RAPSTAR (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official video for "RAPSTAR" by Polo G

Listen + Download "RAPSTAR" out now: https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR

Amazon Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/amazonmusic
Apple Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/applemusic
Audiomack - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/audiomack
Deezer - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/deezer
iTunes - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/itunes
Soundcloud - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/soundcloud
Spotify - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/spotify
YouTube Music - https://polog.lnk.to/RAPSTAR/youtubemusic

Lyrics

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

I won’t love a hoe after we fuck she can’t get near me
Only bitch I give a conversation to is Siri
My pants Amiri
Yes I’m winning clearly
I’m the chosen one see my potential so they fear me
Lately I’ve been praying God I wonder can you hear me
Thinking about the old me I swear I miss you dearly
Stay down until you come up I’ve been sticking to that theory
Every day a battle I’m exhausted and I’m weary
Make sure I smile in public when alone my eyes teary
I fought through it all but that shit hurt me severely 
I’ve been getting high to hide behind my insecurities
Taking different pills but I know it ain’t no 

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

They say I’m Pac rebirth
Never put out a weak verse
Homicides when we lurk
Imma step ‘til my feet hurt
Been putting them streets first
White tee turned burgundy tee shirts
Looking for something real, he stuck in a deep search
Anxiety killing me I just wanna leave Earth
When they ask if I’m okay it just make everything seem worse
Trying to explain your feelings sound like something you rehearse 
Stab me in my back with a clean smirk

Looking so deep into your eyes I can read your thoughts
Shut the fuck- I mean please don’t talk
I’ve done been through too much and I don’t need another loss
Put that on every war scar for every battle that I’ve fought

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished
When I’m finished, when I’m finished

Directed by Arrad
Written & Co-directed by Polo G
Produced by Riveting Entertainment

Follow Polo G
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/pologofficial/
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/polo.capalot/
Tiktok - https://www.tiktok.com/@pologofficial
Twitter - https://twitter.com/Polo_Capalot

#PoloG #RAPSTAR

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years – but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

snippet.title: Er Charli D'Amelio død? | SÅDAN bliver sommeren i fremtiden! | UGENS... med Jonas
snippet.description:
#CharliDAmelio #Klimaforandringer #Rygter 

Er Charli D'Amelio død? Eller hvad er det lige, der sker? Flere har spurgt os på Instagram, om hun er død i en bilulykke. Men passer det? Eller er det bare rygter? Det er noget af det, jeg kigger på i UGENS… i dag!

Charli D'Amelio er verdens største på TikTok, hvor hun har over 111 millioner følgere. En YouTubekanal, der hedder 2021 vision, lagde en video ud, hvor den sagde, at hun ville dø d. 12 marts 2021. Og det satte gang i en masse rygter på sociale medier. For Charli D'Amelio lever stadigvæk og har det godt i dag!

Og så kigger jeg også på fremtidens sommer i Danmark, der måske kan blive rigtige varm. Forskere fortæller, at de tror, vi kan få en sommer, der er 70 da længere. Men det sker først i år 2100. 

Det varme vejr kan betyde mere sol. Mere tørke. Flere skybrud. Det kan gå ud over høsten herhjemme i Danmark, hvis jorden bliver for tør. 

Rigtig god påske! 
Kh

Jonas 

Hvis du kunne lide videoen, så giv den meget gerne et like og abonnér på vores kanal. Det hjælper os rigtig meget! 😊 
Se mere Ultra Nyt her: https://www.dr.dk/drtv/serie/ultra-nyt_7071

Husk at tale pænt. Profilen her modereres efter DRs regler for god opførsel på DRs sociale profiler. Du kan læse dem her: http://dr.dk/talpænt

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder’s Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who’s now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it’s with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing’s for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweighöfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Raúl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweighöfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Raúl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: Derfor er vi i underskud af computerchips
snippet.description:
PlayStation 5 har været udsolgt lige siden den kom ud, tilbage i november. Bilproducenter har svært ved at møde en tilbagevendende efterspørgsel, og Samsung udskyder lanceringen af deres nyeste smartphone.
Vi står i en global mangel på de computerchips der styrer vores moderne, elektroniske verden.
Hvorfor? Det er der mange grunde til…

--- 
Velkommen til DR Nyheders YouTube-kanal.

Her kan du se overraskende og oplysende videoer om den verden, vi lever i.

Du er velkommen til at indlejre/embedde vores videoer på din hjemmeside.

Husk at tale pænt. Kanalen modereres efter DR's debatregler på sociale medier: https://dr.dk/talpænt

Du kan abonnere på vores kanal ved at klikke på DR Nyheder-logoet og du kan også klikke dig videre til mange af vores andre nyhedstilbud.

Facebook: 
https://facebook.com/DRNyheder

Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/DRNyheder/

Twitter: 
https://twitter.com/DRNyheder (alle nyheder)
https://twitter.com/DRBreaking (kun breaking)

DR Nyheder:
https://www.dr.dk/nyheder

DRTV:
https://www.dr.dk/tv

Nyheds-app: Send sms med "APP" til 1212 eller hent den i App Store eller Google Play.

Fejl og fakta vil fremgå på følgende side: https://www.dr.dk/etik-og-rettelser/fejl-og-fakta

Du kan sende ris, ros og klager på https://dr.custhelp.com/

snippet.title: Sadakatsiz 26. Bölüm
snippet.description:
(Nüks eden kırgınlıklar...) 💔
Derin çaresizlik içinde kurtarılmayı beklerken, Asya’nın sabrı da gücü de günden güne azalmaktadır. Yaşanan gelişmeler Asya’yı geçmişe götürsede, alacağı kararlarla herkes için en doğru olanı yapmayı kafasına koymuştur. Derin’i bulmak için iz sürmeye devam eden Volkan, önemli bir gerçekle yüz yüze gelir. Derin’in içinde bulunduğu çıkmaz henüz çözülmemişken yaşanan hangi şok gelişme, dengeleri bir kez daha alt üst edecektir?

💍 Sadakatsiz ailesine katılmak için: https://bit.ly/35JLRRa 🤗
💍 Ayrıcalıklardan yararlanmak için: https://bit.ly/3kCVaHb 🤗
🎵 Sadakatsiz müzikleri için: https://ingroov.es/sadakatsiz 🔊

Oyuncular:
Cansu Dere (Asya)
Caner Cindoruk (Volkan)
Melis Sezen (Derin)
Burak Sergen (Haluk)
Özge Özder (Derya)
Eren Vurdem (Mert)
Yeliz Kuvancı (Bahar)
Olcay Yusufoğlu (Serap)
Nazlı Bulum (Nil)
Gözde Seda Altuner (Gönül)
Emir Taro Tekin (Selçuk)
Alp Akar (Ali)

#Sadakatsiz #CansuDere #CanerCindoruk

snippet.title: The National Debt: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:
The national debt has long been portrayed as a burden we’re placing on future generations. John Oliver discusses how national debt works, why people are so concerned about it, and why it might be more helpful that you think. 

Connect with Last Week Tonight online... 

Subscribe to the Last Week Tonight YouTube channel for more almost news as it almost happens: www.youtube.com/lastweektonight 

Find Last Week Tonight on Facebook like your mom would: www.facebook.com/lastweektonight 

Follow us on Twitter for news about jokes and jokes about news: www.twitter.com/lastweektonight

snippet.title: Crystal Palace 1-4 Chelsea | Blues move back into top four! | Premier League Highlights
snippet.description:
The Blues move back into Premier League top four. 

Download Chelsea FC's official mobile app:
-App Store https://apple.co/2vvlN9t
-Play Store http://bit.ly/2MfNJHX 

Subscribe: http://che.lc/YTsubscribe

To watch more EXCLUSIVE Chelsea content go to: http://che.lc/YTwebsite

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It’s the only channel where you’ll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Every week we’ll be uploading fresh content from the training ground, our famous stadium and much, much more. Nowhere else will you get closer to world-class stars like Christian Pulisic, Kai Havertz, Hakim Ziyech, Timo Werner, N’Golo Kanté, Sam Kerr, Fran Kirby & Pernille Harder.

ABOUT CHELSEA FOOTBALL CLUB
Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

snippet.title: Debunking viral TIK TOK videos | How To Cook That Ann Reardon
snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE on youtube: http://bit.ly/H2CThat  
Support: https://patreon.com/h2ct
📘 My Cookbook: https://bit.ly/ARcookbook 📘
COMPETITION: https://www.howtocookthat.net/public_html/?p=119105
Recipe: http://howtocookthat.net
Merch: https://www.youtube.com/howtocookthat/store 
How To Cook That Channel: http://youtube.com/howtocookthat
Hi I am Ann Reardon, How to Cook That is my youtube channel it is  filled with crazy sweet creations made just for you.   This week we are debunking viral Tik Tok and facebook videos that have been sent in to me.  Fake food videos seem to be on the rise because they re being rewarded by the platforms with views.  In this episode lets look at does Pepsi make worm parasites come out of pork?  Can you dice strawberry with razor blades?  Can you make pear jelly using lemonade?  Does storing strawberries in a jar make them last longer?  Can you cook steak in a toaster?   Join me for food science, creative cakes, chocolate & desserts, new video every second Friday.   

🍓OZZIESDELIGHT strawberry hack: https://www.instagram.com/tv/CKWl7a6llSb/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link

snippet.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
snippet.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

I'm at https://tomscott.com
on Twitter at https://twitter.com/tomscott
on Facebook at https://facebook.com/tomscott
and on Instagram as tomscottgo

snippet.title: Sebastian gik viralt med 'åndssvag' idé | Upcoming
snippet.description:
- I lang tid holdt jeg min kanal hemmelig, siger Sebastian, der står bag YouTube-kanalen '@Spaghetti Road'.

Hemmeligheden varede dog kun ved, indtil han en dag uploadede en video med et lidt besynderligt formål, der gav ham 60.000 subscribers på et par uger.

#DR3Upcoming​

------------------------------

Klik her for at abonnere på DR3: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-O76wR9_voY34a6wvGo-5Q?sub_confirmation=1

Velkommen til DR3's YouTube-kanal. Her får du ugentligt originalt, undersøgende og aktuelt indhold fra DR3's programmer og fra vores digitale serier. Tjek vores playlister og find de bedste kortdoks, programklip fra vores reportageserier, dokumentarer og dramaserier og de nyeste originale produktioner.

Følg DR3:
http://www.facebook.com/dr3dk
http://instagram.com/dr3tv

Husk at tale pænt! Profilen her modereres efter DRs regler for god opførsel på DRs sociale profiler. Du kan læse dem her: dr.dk/talpænt.

Du kan til hver en tid kan besøge DRTV på www.dr.dk/tv, hvor du kan se både nye og gamle programmer i fuld længde.

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico — go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz — this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful — please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive — https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive — https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. — https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. — https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster — https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. — https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. — https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon — https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. — https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. — https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. — https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. — https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. — https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton — https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

snippet.title: Matt Gaetz is So Toxic, Even Trump Won’t Meet with Him
snippet.description:
School re-opened for many kids in Los Angeles today, UFO sightings have skyrocketed during the pandemic, Florida Congressman Matt Gaetz made an appearance for the “Save America” Summit and was denied a meeting with Trump, Donny trashed Mitch McConnell and wants credit for the vaccine, multiple citizens from Cincinnati called 911 claiming they saw monkeys on the loose, and Jimmy and Guillermo met up with U.S. Olympian Allen James to learn how to racewalk.

Watch Mean Tweets: http://bit.ly/KimmelMT10

Jimmy Kimmel serves as host and executive producer of Emmy®-nominated “Jimmy Kimmel Live!,” ABC’s late-night talk show. “Jimmy Kimmel Live!” is well known for its huge viral video successes, with over 11 billion views and more than 15 million subscribers on the show’s YouTube channel. Some of Kimmel’s most popular comedy bits include “Celebrities Read Mean Tweets,” “Lie Witness News,” “Unnecessary Censorship,” “Halloween Candy YouTube Challenge,” and music videos like “I (Wanna) Channing All Over Your Tatum.”

snippet.description:

#KUWTK #KeepingUpWithTheKardashians #EEntertainment #KimKardashian #KhloéKardashian #KourtneyKardashian #KylieJenner #KendallJenner #KrisJenner #AddisonRae

"Keeping Up with the Kardashians” takes viewers beyond the headlines and into the stories that dominate the news cycle and E! is the only destination to get the real story. Keep Up with the Kardashian-Jenner fam as they build business empires, face personal challenges, and share ups and downs together. Through all the epic moments, one thing remains the same… family always comes first. snippet.title: Çukur 4.Sezon 32.Bölüm
snippet.description:
Bu dizi ve çok daha fazlası puhutv'de → https://puhutv.com/cukur-detay?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=youtube&utm_campaign=cukur&utm_content=detay

Çukur'a Abone Olmak İçin → https://bit.ly/cukur-dd-sub

4.Sezon 32. Bölüm Özet:

Yamaç’ın, Amca’nın kurduğu düzeni bitirmek için yaptığı zeka dolu plan Vartolu ve Yamaç’ı bir kez daha karşı karşıya getirecek. Kararından geri adım atmayan Yamaç’ın aksiyonu nefesleri kesecek. İçindeki ateşi yeniden bulan Cumali, sürpriz bir hamle ile mahalledeki tüm dengeleri değiştirecek. Karaca’nın sürpriz bir ziyaretçi yüzünden kafası karışacak. Celasun’dan haber alamayan Karaca, peşine düştüğü ipucu sayesinde önemli bir bilgi elde edecek. Bu bilgi Amca ve Karaca’yı karşı karşıya getirirken, gerçekleşen yüzleşmenin sonucu herkesi şoka uğratacak.


Yönetmen: Sinan Öztürk
Senaryo: Gökhan Horzum, Damla Serim
Yapımcı: Kerem Çatay
İdari Yapımcı: Yamaç Okur
Müzik: Toygar Işıklı
2. Yönetmen: Barbaros Bilgin
Görüntü Yönetmeni: Tolga Kutluay
Sanat Yönetmeni: Oya Köseoğlu

Sultan: Perihan Savaş
Cumali Amca: Müfit Kayacan
Vartolu: Erkan Kolçak Köstendil

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Film Theory: Dear DC, I Fixed Your Universe! (Justice League Snyder Cut)
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH    

So now that we've all finally got to see the infamous Snyder Cut of DC's The Justice League, we're good right? Wrong! Now the people want to make it CANON! Well Theorists, what if I told you it already was? What if the original vision of Zack Snyder's Justice League has ALWAYS been canon? That's right! Before you send off that #RestoreTheSnyderVerse tweet, watch this video! It may have you saying #SnyderVerseIsAlreadyCanon instead.

snippet.title: MAGA Congressman Matt Gaetz Snubbed by Trump Amid Growing Scandals: A Closer Look
snippet.description:
Seth takes a closer look at the House Ethics Committee opening an investigation into Congressman Matt Gaetz, who was reportedly snubbed by his political idol Donald Trump.

Late Night with Seth Meyers is supporting God’s Love We Deliver to help those in need during the COVID-19 pandemic. God’s Love We Deliver is a New York City-based organization that for over 30 years has provided personalized meals and nutrition counseling, free of charge, to those living with severe illnesses. With the help of 17,000 volunteers, God’s Love We Deliver provides over 2 million free meals each year to thousands of New York’s most vulnerable. Click the button on the above/below to donate or visit www.glwd.org.

snippet.title: Hailey Bieber On The Early Late Night Show | Dixie D'Amelio
snippet.description:
Hey guys!!! I'm back with Episode 2 and I couldn't be happier that @Hailey Rhode Bieber is our second guest! We had a lot of fun together, learning some secrets about each other and making custom shoes for each other!! Don't forget the show airs every Sunday at 10AM PST/1PM EST!!! Thanks for watching!

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmG​
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuo​
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLR​
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

snippet.title: Kardeşlerim 8. Bölüm
snippet.description:
8. Bölüm Özeti: 
 “Kalp en çok tutunduğu dala kırılır!”
Kenan’ın ölümü tüm dengeleri değiştirirken Suzan, Akif, Nebahat cephesinde sular durulmaz. Çocuklar yaşadığı felaketten sonra yaşamlarını düzene sokmak için var gücüyle çalışırken, Orhan’ın sunduğu teklif Kadir’le Ömer’i umutlandırır. Kadir’in Süsen’le olan arkadaşlığının iç yüzünü öğrenen Melisa, Kadir’le yüzleşmek ister.  Şengül’ün Nebahat’ten alacağı paranın hayaliyle girdiği borçlar, Orhan’la arasının açılmasına sebep olur. Berk’in Aybike’yi zora sokan planı ise beklenmedik olaylara yol açar.

Kardeşlerim kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halit Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

atv resmi YouTube kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/2Pddn3r

snippet.title: We BUILT a Mandalorian JETPACK! (HACKLORIAN: CHAPTER 5)
snippet.description:
Download and play AFK Arena: https://patron.me/HacksmithAFK Join AFK Arena's 2nd anniversary event: April 6th to May 5th and get 100 free summons and 1 special gift code: aaz27uvgfi
OUR NEW SHIRT ► https://hacksmith.store/collections/special-offers/products/the-hacklorian-t-shirt

In our HACKLORIAN series, we'll be making all of Mando's gadgets, armor, and weapons! Make sure to become a YouTube member to see the videos before anyone else! Next up... Grapple gun!

Check out the circuit diagram at Maker.IO ► https://www.digikey.com/en/maker/projects/the-hacksmith-building-a-mandalorian-jetpack/054d24f65f574fcc8cfb0b90b6d26f6f

Watch the Mandalorian on Disney+ ► https://www.disneyplus.com/sign-up

Watch the whole Hacklorian Series Playlist ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX8192MVmd8&list=PLbncXbXlaNQcxSSb0THFDaDy_C_ojvYig

Check out JLCPCB for all your PCB needs! ► https://jlcpcb.com/RHS

Become a Hacksmith member get exclusive perks! ► https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjgpFI5dU-D1-kh9H1muoxQ/join
►Early video access 
►Project design files (solidworks)
►Merch Discounts 
►Collaborate with us on our videos 

SOCIAL
Website ► http://www.hacksmith.tech
Facebook ► http://www.facebook.com/thehacksmith
Instagram ► http://www.instagram.com/thehacksmith
Twitter ► http://twitter.com/thehacksmith
Patreon ► http://www.patreon.com/thehacksmith
Discord ► https://discordapp.com/invite/thehacksmith 
Merch ► https://www.hacksmith.store

CHAPTERS: 
0:00 Intro
2:00 Our Jetpack Components
3:24 James and Bogdan Talk Design
6:48 Cross Vectoring Jets!
7:30 Mounting The Components
8:20 Build a PCB!
9:22 The Jetpack Cover
13:03 Does It Work With The Costume?
13:45 Final Assembly
16:29 Outro

MUSIC CREDITS:
Big thank you to Samuel Kim Music for the epic music!
https://www.youtube.com/c/samuelkimmusic 
https://twitter.com/samuelkimmusic 
https://www.instagram.com/samuelkimmusic

SOFTWARE:
PCB Design ► https://www.altium.com/yt/TheHacksmith
Video Review / Collaboration ► http://r.frame.io/pZq3N
Video Editing ► Adobe Premiere 
CAD ► Solidworks 
CAM ► Autodesk HSM http://bit.ly/HSMworks

CAMERA GEAR:
Highspeed Cam - Chronos 1.4 ► http://bit.ly/chronosCam
Main shooter - Panasonic GH5s ► https://bhpho.to/2Fjd80N 
Phone - Samsung S10  ► https://bhpho.to/2N8FOh8
Camcorder - Sony Handycam ► https://bhpho.to/2FDnq81 
Action Cam - GoPro ► https://bhpho.to/2FxXDC4 
Steadicam - Removu K1 ► https://bhpho.to/2N9lDQq 
Main mic - Sennheiser ► https://bhpho.to/2DsR8ec
Bendy Tripod ► https://bhpho.to/2FyLNb0 
Main Tripods - old second hand Manfrotto tripods no longer sold. 
Studio Light - Luxli ► https://bhpho.to/2N9SPav

TOOLS / MACHINES: 
CNC Mill - Tormach 1100MX ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8DWG0
CNC Mill - Tormach PCNC 440 ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8DYk0
CNC Lathe - Tormach 15L ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gcp0
Autofeed Bandsaw - Tormach AF50 ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gj10
CNC Waterjet Cutter ► http://bit.ly/wazerJet
CNC Plasma Cutter ► http://bit.ly/EMTplasma
3d Printers ► http://bit.ly/H1Printer
Laser Cutter - Gweike LG900N 80W ► http://lmgtfy.com/?q=lg900n 
3d Scanner ► http://amzn.to/2pwbvTu
Drills, drivers, grinders, saws, etc ► http://amzn.to/2p9SPJ3 
Mig Welder ► http://bit.ly/MP250iWelder
Tig Welder ► http://bit.ly/Tig200Welder
Quiet Air Compressor ► http://bit.ly/38zVKzB
Desktop PC ► https://youtu.be/gSbt3LK8hCs 
Oscilloscope ► https://bit.ly/38sOzKw
Multimeters ► https://bit.ly/2WKwPEQ

Purchases made through some store links may provide some compensation to Hacksmith.

WARNING: THESE VIDEOS ARE FOR ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSES ONLY. PERSONAL USE OF VIDEO CONTENT IS AT YOUR OWN RISK. THE HACKSMITH IS A TRAINED PROFESSIONAL WHO KNOWS EXACTLY WHAT HE'S DOING. EXCEPT WHEN HE DOESN'T. DO NOT ATTEMPT TO RECREATE OR RE-ENACT ANYTHING SHOWN IN THESE VIDEOS.

#hacklorian #mandalorian #makeitreal

snippet.title: EPIC HOMEMADE James Bond Car
snippet.description:
No other Z3 can spit fire, lift itself up, shoot, Smoke and deliver biscuits at the flick of a switch.

Make sure you check out the new series of Top Gear with Freddie, Paddy and Chris on BBC One, Sundays at 8pm - or on BBCiPlayer here http://bbc.in/38Tc3JN

And check out the Top Gear https://www.youtube.com/user/TopGear and James Bond https://www.youtube.com/user/jamesbond007 YouTube channels too!

Part 1 here https://youtu.be/QDoF8jwMcH0
Part 2 here https://youtu.be/qZydcgde1Ms

Follow me on Social Media.
Instagram https://www.instagram.com/realcolinfurze/
Twitter https://twitter.com/colin_furze
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/Colin-furze-521680751253584
TikTok https://vm.tiktok.com/JJ8wSTs/

Music

Its all Library music apart from 2 track by the band "Rock Cake" called "I want You" and "Bad News"
https://www.instagram.com/RockCakeMusic

In a band? Want your music on my videos! Send your tracks to furzemail@yahoo.co.uk as all music on this channel is from viewers

#colinfurze #topgear #jamesbond

snippet.title: KSI and Little Mix’s Jade Thirlwall rock Bake Off! | The Great Stand Up To Cancer Bake Off
snippet.description:
Watch more classic celebrity moments from the Bake Off archive: https://bit.ly/MoreBakeOff 

Internet celebrity KSI and Little Mix star Jade Thirlwall trade the boxing ring and the music studio for the Bake Off Tent, alongside comedian Katherine Ryan and documentary maker Stacey Dooley in aid of Stand Up To Cancer. Will KSI's fondant fancies deliver a knockout blow in the signature, or will Jade's latticed cherry pie create a 'sweet melody' in the technical? As for their 'What I Cannot Live Without' biscuit & meringue scene showstoppers, they truly have to be seen to be believed... 
 
#GBBO​ #CelebBakeOff​ #BakeOff​ #KSI #JadeThirlwall

SUBSCRIBE for weekly videos: https://bit.ly/BakeOffonYouTube​ 
CATCH UP with the latest series on Channel 4's All 4: https://bit.ly/SU2CBakeOffonAll4​

GIVE DOUGH A GO: 
Try out the Technical Challenge recipe attempted by the celebs: https://bit.ly/GBBOCherryPie

LIKE AND FOLLOW:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/BakeOffFacebook​ 
Twitter: https://bit.ly/BakeOffTwitter​ 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/BakeOffInstagram​ 
Official Website: https://bit.ly/BakeOffWebsite​ 

ABOUT BAKE OFF:
The Great British Bake Off is the ultimate baking battle where passionate amateur baking fans compete to be crowned the UK’s Best Amateur Baker. 

ABOUT THE GREAT STAND UP TO CANCER BAKE OFF:
The Great British Bake Off welcomes an array of famous faces into the Tent to battle it out for the coveted Star Baker apron in aid of Stand Up To Cancer. In each episode, the celebrities tackle Signature, Technical and Showstopper challenges - all under the watchful eyes of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith.

snippet.title: Try not to laugh CHALLENGE | Premier League edition
snippet.description:
Do you have what it takes to complete the Premier League try not to laugh challenge? Let us know how you get on in the comments!

This video features Steven Gerrard and a Chelsea mascot, Sir Alex Ferguson versus a balloon, a Louis van Gaal dive, David Dunn’s rabona fail, Steven Taylor’s best goalkeeper impression, Kevin De Bruyne hitting a corner flag and more!

บอกเลยว่าห้ามยิ้ม! คิดว่าจะทนกับชาเลนจ์ห้ามขำของพรีเมียร์ลีกไหวรึเปล่า? คอมเมนท์บอกผลหน่อยนะ!

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch Jim’s video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting Wednesday, April 7 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. The instantaneous window is at 12:34 p.m. EDT, or 16:34 UTC, and a backup opportunity is available on Thursday, April 8 at 12:12 p.m. EDT, or 16:12 UTC.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously supported launch of NASA astronauts Bob Behnken and Doug Hurley to the International Space Station, ANASIS-II, CRS-21, Transporter-1, and two Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9’s first stage on the “Of Course I Still Love You” droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. One half of Falcon 9’s fairing prevouisly supported launch of AMOS-17 and two Starlink missions, and the other previously supported a Starlink mission.

snippet.title: Kardeşlerim 7. Bölüm
snippet.description:
7.Bölüm Özeti: 
 “Biraz umut ekmiştim şuraya, söküp atmışlar usulca…”
Nebahat şantajıyla Akif’i alt edeceğini düşünürken, Akif Nebahat’ı ters köşe yapma planları içindedir. Suzan’ın düşmesiyle yaşanan beklenmedik sonuç Harika’nın annesinin geçmişiyle ilgili yeni bir şey daha öğrenmesine sebep olur. Kadir’in Süsen’le olan arkadaşlığı, Melisa’ya hayal kırıklığı yaşatırken; Berk, bunu fırsata çevirmeye çalışır. Nebahat, Akif tarafından oyuna getirilince yaşadığı öfke dönülmez sonuçlar doğururken, Asiye’yi bekleyen felaket herkese büyük korku yaşatır.

Kardeşlerim kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halit Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

atv resmi YouTube kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/2Pddn3r

Nebahat şantajıyla Akif’i alt edeceğini düşünürken, Akif Nebahat’ı ters köşe yapma planları içindedir. Suzan’ın düşmesiyle yaşanan beklenmedik sonuç Harika’nın annesinin geçmişiyle ilgili yeni bir şey daha öğrenmesine sebep olur. Kadir’in Süsen’le olan arkadaşlığı, Melisa’ya hayal kırıklığı yaşatırken; Berk, bunu fırsata çevirmeye çalışır. Nebahat, Akif tarafından oyuna getirilince yaşadığı öfke dönülmez sonuçlar doğururken, Asiye’yi bekleyen felaket herkese büyük korku yaşatır.

Kardeşlerim kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halit Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

atv resmi YouTube kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/2Pddn3r

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Scar EAT Mufasa? (The Lion King)
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH    

Last time I talked about the Lion King, we were seeing just how big the body count was for this beloved Disney movie and sayong Scar was the rightful king. WEll, we are leaning into that even HARDER this time! Today, I want to talk about the sibling rivalry to end all sibling rivalries - Scar and Mufasa. Theorists, lions are a very, VERY interesting animal. I think that Scar ATE Mufasa after the stampede. You'll have to watch to find out WHY!

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

snippet.title: E3: Mohamed Daramy - I Danmark er jeg født!
snippet.description:
F.C. København og Christopher Cloos præsenterer dokumentarserien "Mohamed Daramy - I Danmark er jeg født."

I tredje episode af dokumentaren fortæller Mohamed Daramy om den første gang, hvor han fandt ud af at et manglende dansk pas gav ham problemer med at spille ungdomslandskampe for Danmark. Derudover følger vi også 'Mo' bevæge sig ind i en voksen-verden, selvom han stadig kun er 17 år gammel. 

Se første episode her ⬇️
https://youtu.be/kHH8aE_MaSk

Se anden episode her ⬇️
https://youtu.be/aR-saYvb_Ns

Se fjerde episode her ⬇️
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t4WuYZhdcIw

Dokumentarserien løber i fem episoder, og episode nummer tre udkommer 14. april. Dokumentaren er lavet i samarbejde med Officiel Eyewear Partner i F.C. København, Christopher Cloos.


Credit-list:

snippet.title: Building Thumb Bucket Trail Ep 1 (Construction begins on our baddest trail yet)
snippet.description:
We're finally getting back to trail building, after a Winter recovering from injury. This time, we're going big and machine cutting a bike-park style trail. This means I need to learn to run a machine. Also because this project will take so much time, we need to break the process up into multiple episodes.

Berm Peak Hoodies, Beanies, Jerseys, Shirts
https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection

Check out our second channel for "express" videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOpP5PqrzODWpFU961acUbg

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/sethsbikehacks

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20

Support Berm Park! The free public bike park that YOU can ride! Join my Patreon and 100% of the proceeds go towards funding this. Construction begins mid 2022 
Learn more here https://www.patreon.com/sethsbikehacks
Video explaining Berm Parkhttps://youtu.be/lZLE6zB-uuI

Advertising disclosure: All of these videos contain products, logos, or mentions associated with Diamondback Bicycles. Whether or not the video itself was sponsored by Diamondback, they do support this channel, and by extension, every video on it.

snippet.title: FULL METAL Mando Helmet! (HACKLORIAN: Chapter 3)
snippet.description:
Visit https://omaze.com/HACKSMITH to enter for your chance to win a CUSTOM TESLA MODEL S! Use code HACKSMITH150 to get 150 additional entries!

Watch the Mandalorian on Disney+ ► https://www.disneyplus.com/sign-up
Watch the whole Hacklorian Series Playlist ► https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX8192MVmd8&list=PLbncXbXlaNQcxSSb0THFDaDy_C_ojvYig

In our HACKLORIAN series, we'll be making all of Mando's gadgets, armor, and weapons! Make sure to become a YouTube member to see the videos before anyone else! Next up... Grogu's Floating Cradle!!! And then... THE JETPACK!

GET MERCH ► https://www.Hacksmith.store

Become a Hacksmith member get exclusive perks! ► https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjgpFI5dU-D1-kh9H1muoxQ/join
►Early video access 
►Project design files (solidworks)
►Merch Discounts 
►Collaborate with us on our videos 

SOCIAL
Website ► http://www.hacksmith.tech
Facebook ► http://www.facebook.com/thehacksmith
Instagram ► http://www.instagram.com/thehacksmith
Twitter ► http://twitter.com/thehacksmith
Patreon ► http://www.patreon.com/thehacksmith
Discord ► https://discordapp.com/invite/thehacksmith 
Merch ► https://www.hacksmith.store

CHAPTERS: 
0:00 Intro
2:03 Helmet Design
4:01 Build Begins
7:39 Welding Time!
12:03 Helmet Durability Test
12:39 Final Touches
13:53 This Is The Way
14:30 Outro

Video Editing ► Adobe Premiere 
CAD ► Solidworks 
CAM ► Autodesk HSM http://bit.ly/HSMworks

Main shooter - Panasonic GH5s ► https://bhpho.to/2Fjd80N

Steadicam - Removu K1 ► https://bhpho.to/2N9lDQq 
Main mic - Sennheiser ► https://bhpho.to/2DsR8ec
Bendy Tripod ► https://bhpho.to/2FyLNb0 
Main Tripods - old second hand Manfrotto tripods no longer sold. 
Studio Light - Luxli ► https://bhpho.to/2N9SPav

TOOLS / MACHINES: 
CNC Mill - Tormach 1100MX ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8DWG0
CNC Mill - Tormach PCNC 440 ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8DYk0
CNC Lathe - Tormach 15L ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gcp0
Autofeed Bandsaw - Tormach AF50 ► https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gj10
CNC Waterjet Cutter ► http://bit.ly/wazerJet
CNC Plasma Cutter ► http://bit.ly/EMTplasma
3d Printers ► http://bit.ly/H1Printer
Laser Cutter - Gweike LG900N 80W ► http://lmgtfy.com/?q=lg900n 
3d Scanner ► http://amzn.to/2pwbvTu
Drills, drivers, grinders, saws, etc ► http://amzn.to/2p9SPJ3 
Mig Welder ► http://bit.ly/MP250iWelder
Tig Welder ► http://bit.ly/Tig200Welder
Quiet Air Compressor ► http://bit.ly/38zVKzB
Desktop PC ► https://youtu.be/gSbt3LK8hCs

Multimeters ► https://bit.ly/2WKwPEQ

Purchases made through some store links may provide some compensation to Hacksmith.

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“You really find out who’s there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.”
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato’s new song, “Dancing With The Devil”: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

ko.title: 힘 되찾기 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
"모든 게 잘못되면 누가 진정한 친구인지 알게 돼요"
데미는 재활 시설에 가서 회복의 여정을 시작하지만, 걸림돌을 만난다. 약물 과다 복용 이후 처음으로 무대 위로 돌아온 데미는 자신의 인생에서 균형을 찾아야 한다.

도움받을 곳:

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 

전국 성폭력 핫라인
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

정신 건강 교육과 자원은 Hope For The Day의 hftd.org에서 확인하세요.

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

fr.title: Reprendre le contrôle : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"On découvre ceux qui sont là pour nous quand le monde se dérobe sous nos pieds."

Demi va en cure de désintoxication et emprunte la voie de la guérison, non sans obstacles. Alors qu'elle s'apprête à retrouver la scène pour la première fois après son overdose, elle doit trouver un équilibre dans sa vie.

Ressources :
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Hotline National Sexual Assault
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
  
Pour en savoir plus sur la santé mentale, rendez-vous sur Hope for the Day à hftd.org.
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.

es-419.title: retomando el control : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Descubres realmente con quién puedes contar cuando el mundo se te cae encima".
Demi va a rehabilitación y comienza a recuperarse, pero se encuentra con obstáculos en el camino. Al volver a los escenarios por primera vez desde su sobredosis, necesita encontrar el equilibrio en su vida.
Recursos:

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Línea directa nacional para agresiones sexuales
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Para obtener información y recursos sobre salud mental, visita Hope for the Day en hftd.org

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

id.title: Meraih Kekuatan Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Kau akan benar-benar mengetahui siapa yang berada di sisimu ketika kehidupanmu hancur berantakan.”
Demi menjalani rehabilitasi dan memulai perjalanannya untuk pemulihan, tetapi dengan berbagai rintangan. Di saat dia kembali naik panggung untuk pertama kali sejak dirinya overdosis, dia perlu menemukan keseimbangan di dalam hidupnya.
Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Saluran siaga Serangan Seksual Nasional
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Untuk pendidikan kesehatan mental dan sumber kunjungi Hope for the Day di hftd.org

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

de.title: Die Kontrolle zurückgewinnen : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
“Man erkennt wirklich, wer zu einem steht, wenn einem die Welt unter den Füßen wegbricht.“
Demi macht einen Entzug und beginnt ihren Genesungsweg, allerdings mit Hindernissen. Als sie zum ersten Mal nach ihrer Überdosis wieder auf der Bühne steht, muss sie Balance in ihrem Leben finden.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Anlaufstelle bei sexueller Gewalt
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Für Informationen und Quellen zu psychischer Gesundheit besuchen Sie Hope for the Day auf hftd.org

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

pt-BR.title: retomando o controle : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Você só descobre com quem pode contar quando você fica sem chão.”
Demi entra na clínica de recuperação e começa seu tratamento, enfrentando alguns problemas no caminho. Ao voltar aos palcos pela primeira vez após a overdose, ela precisa encontrar equilíbrio em sua vida.”

Recursos:
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

snippet.title: 5 minutes from death : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
“I knew that what I’d been looking for, I hadn’t found yet. But what I had been looking for was not in the form of a drug.”
Demi and her closest confidants give a firsthand account of the aftermath of the overdose as she wakes up in the hospital after being minutes away from death.

Episode 3 available March 30 @ 12p PT

Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi Lovato’s new album ‘Dancing With The Devil… The Art Of Starting Over’ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

pt-BR.title: a 5 minutos da morte  : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
“Sabia que ainda não havia encontrado o que buscava. Mas o que eu buscava, não era em formato de drogas.”
Demi e seus confidentes mais íntimos contam em primeira mão as consequências da overdose enquanto ela acorda no hospital, após quase morrer.

Recursos:
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivíduos e familiares que enfrentam distúrbios ligados à saúde mental e/ou por uso de substâncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Caso necessite de auxílio imediato, entre em contato com suas opções locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
Canadá: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

ko.title: 죽기 5분 전 : Dancing with the Devil
ko.description:
“제가 찾던 걸 아직 찾지 못했다는 걸 알았어요. 하지만 제가 찾던 건 약물이 아니었죠"
데미와 가장 가까운 사람들이 생사를 가른 몇 분 후 데미가 병원에서 깨어나고 약물 복용에 따른 결과를 직접 본 일을 털어놓는다.

도움받을 곳:

정신건강 및 약물 남용 장애를 앓고 있는 개인 및 가족을 위한 SAMHSA 핫라인
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
전국 성폭력 핫라인
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

즉각적인 도움이 필요할 경우, 지역 위기 문자를 이용하세요.
미국: 741741로 문자 HOME 보내기
영국: 85258로 문자 SHOUT 보내기
캐나다: 686868 또는 741741로 문자 CONNECT 보내기

endoverdose.net에서 생명을 구할 수 있는 방법을 알아보세요.

es-419.title: A 5 minutos de la muerte : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Sabía que lo que estaba buscando no lo había encontrado todavía. Pero lo que estaba buscando no era una droga".
Demi y sus seres queridos relatan en primera persona las secuelas de la sobredosis cuando se despierta en el hospital tras haber estado a minutos de la muerte.

Recursos:

Línea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Línea directa nacional para agresiones sexuales
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: Envía el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: Envía el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
Canadá: Envía el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

de.title: Dem Tode nah : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
"Ich wusste, ich hatte noch nicht gefunden, wonach ich suchte. Aber ich suchte nicht nach Drogen."

Demi und ihre engsten Vertrauten erzählen aus erster Hand von der Zeit nach der Überdosis, als sie im Krankenhaus aufwachte, nachdem sie dem Tod knapp entronnen war.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA für Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder Suchtstörungen und deren Angehörige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Anlaufstelle bei sexueller Gewalt
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benötigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes Königreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

id.title: 5 Menit dari Kematian : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
“Aku sudah mengetahui apa yang aku cari selama ini, tetapi aku belum menemukannya. Namun, hal yang kucari selama ini bukan dalam bentuk obat.”

Demi dan orang kepercayaan terdekatnya menceritakan secara langsung akibat dari peristiwa overdesis ketika dia bangun di rumah sakit setelah beberapa menit nyaris mati.

Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Saluran siaga Serangan Seksual Nasional
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

fr.title: À 5 minutes de la mort : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
“Je savais que je n'avais pas encore trouvé ce que je cherchais. Mais la réponse n'était pas dans la drogue." 


Demi et ses plus proches confidents font le compte-rendu des conséquences de l'overdose à son réveil à l'hôpital, après être passée à quelques minutes de la mort.

Ressources :
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face à des troubles de la santé mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Hotline National Sexual Assault
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
En cas de besoin immédiat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
États-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
 
Apprenez à sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.

snippet.title: How to Buy a Budget Friendly Project Car
snippet.description:
Learn how you can buy a project car for less than the cost of a new cell phone! Project cars are great for learning how to fix a car and when you are "done" (project cars are never done), you can be proud to drive the car you fixed up!
In this series eBay Motors challenged me to buy a 24hr endurance race car for the 24hrs of Lemons race series. The car I chose had to be fast, reliable, and under $500!

eBay Motors (show them some love): https://ebayvehicle.com/app/ChrisFix

BlueDriver OBD 2 Code Scanner: https://amzn.to/2QHkn9r

The BEST Pricing on Racing Gear: https://www.stableenergies.com/
Visit Stable Energies: 175 Passaic St, Garfield, NJ 07026

→ As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases.
→ Become a ChrisFix Subscriber: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=paintballoo7
→ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chrisfixit
→ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/chrisfix8
→ Website: http://www.ChrisFixed.com
→ My Channel Home Page: https://www.youtube.com/ChrisFix

snippet.title: 73 Questions With Cole Sprouse | Vogue
snippet.description:
Actor Cole Sprouse invites Vogue into his picturesque Vancouver dwelling as he answers 73 rapid-fire questions. As Cole walks around his suite (while highlighting the magical views) he talks about his love for photography, archeology, and cooking. 

Directed by Carrie Irwin
Interviewed by Joe Sabia
DP: Briggs Ogloff
Producers: Jenna Allchin, Pip Groom
Associate Producer: Arielle Neblett
Production Manager: Emily Yates
Edit: Daniel Poler
Color: Oliver Eid
Post Sound: Nick Cipriano at BANG Audio Post

snippet.title: Masumiyet 5. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Masumiyet 5. Bölüm Tek Parça İzle
(24 Mart Çarşamba)

Masumiyet 6. Bölümü İzlemek İçin 👉🏻 https://youtu.be/asaH3BlwtJE

Masumiyet Her Çarşamba 20.00'de FOX'ta!

Ela ve İlker’in olay yerinde yaşadıkları yüzleşme, Ela için yapbozun eksik parçalarını yerine koyar. Ela’nın hatırladıklarını kaldırması hiç kolay olmaz. Bir yandan İrem’in şok intiharıyla, diğer yanda Ela’dan gördüğü tepkiyle köşeye sıkışan İlker bir kez daha annesine sığınır. Hale, oğlunu kurtarmak için düğmeye basar ve İlker’i yurt dışına kaçırmak için harekete geçer. Diğer yanda, Bahar ve Ela’nın zorbalığa karşı verdikleri sınav, İrem’in çektiği video sonrası yaşananlarla bir kez daha alevlenir. Ela yine hedefteki isimdir. İntiharı sonrasında yaşananlarla birlikte, İrem, Hale’nin ocağına düşer ve yeni bir hamle yapmak zorunda kalır.  Kızının, evliliği yüzünden sürüklendiği noktayı hazmedemeyen Harun, Bahar’la sessiz bir iş birliği içine girer. Bahar da, kızlar arasındaki tehlikeli düşmanlığa rağmen Harun’a güvenmeyi seçer.  Ela’nın kaybettiği bebeğini hatırlaması herkes için işin rengini değiştirirken, Hale’nin kaçış planı anne oğul için ya kurtuluş ya da sonun başlangıcıdır.

Evli ve iki çocuk annesi Bahar’ın (Deniz Çakır) hayatı, 19 yaşındaki kızının yanlış bir adama aşık olmasıyla değişir. Kızı Ela’nın (İlayda Alişan) ilk aşkı, yaşıtı bir üniversite öğrencisi değil babasının, başkasıyla evlenmek üzere olan 35 yaşındaki patronudur. Kızını bu yanlış ilişkiden kurtarmaya çalışan Bahar, ne yapsa da olacakların önüne geçemez. Bahar ve ailesinin hayatı, Ela’nın 19. yaş gününde sonsuza kadar değişir.

OYUNCULAR: HÜLYA AVŞAR, MEHMET ASLANTUĞ, DENİZ ÇAKIR, İLAYDA ALİŞAN, SERKAY TÜTÜNCÜ, DENİZ IŞIN, SELEN UÇER, TOLGA GÜLEÇ, NESLİHAN ARSLAN, ASENA TUĞAL, ERTUĞRUL POSTOĞLU, ALAYÇA ÖZTÜRK GİDİŞLİ, KİMYA GÖKÇE AYTAÇ, GİZEM ERGÜN, ASENA KESKİNCİ, OZAN KAYA OKTU, SEVGİ TEMEL, RÜÇHAN ÇALIŞKUR

FOX Resmi Web Sitesi: https://www.fox.com.tr
Masumiyet: https://www.fox.com.tr/Masumiyet/izle
Resmi Facebook Sayfası: https://www.facebook.com/masumiyetfox/

#Masumiyet #içimdekiboşluk #FOX #FOXplay

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Exploring the $200,000,000 Abandoned Disney Castle Village (530 Castles)
snippet.description:
Thanks to Audible for sponsoring this episode! Go to http://www.audible.com/yestheory or text yestheory to 500 500 and start listening today!

🙏🏼 Thank you for making these videos possible through your support of Seek Discomfort 
⚡️ SEEK DISCOMFORT: http://seek-discomfort.com/yes-theory

As Thomas is still trying to figure his way back to the US... He stopped in Turkey and found these $200,000,000 abandoned Disney-like castles in the countryside of Turkey... Such a strange sight and to go explore it, he brought 2 subscribers along for the adventure.

✈ Book an Adventure: https://travel.yestheory.com/
